heading: Consideration for Two-Factor Authentication
body:
Atlas bypasses 2FA (Two Factor Authentication) for users who authenticate with federated authentication
through your IdP (Identity Provider). If a user authenticates through your IdP (Identity Provider) and has 2FA (Two Factor Authentication)
for their Atlas account enabled, Atlas doesn't prompt the user for
2FA (Two Factor Authentication). Instead, you can configure your trusted IdP (Identity Provider) to prompt users for 2FA (Two Factor Authentication).
To learn more, see [enable multi-factor authentication](atlas-enable-mfa).
